action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 3 achieved AUC-ROC 0.7579 with a 2-layer LSTM (hidden=256, embed=256, dropout=0.3) and early stopping at epoch 17. Training loss was still slowly decreasing while val AUC plateaued, suggesting we can benefit from more model capacity and a stronger prediction head. Analysis: We have ~28 minutes and 27 iterations remaining, with each training run taking ~20-40 seconds. We can safely experiment with larger hidden dimensions, a small MLP head, LayerNorm, and AdamW + cosine annealing to push AUC higher. Decision: Update model.py to use hidden=512, embed=256, add LayerNorm + MLP head. Update train.py to use AdamW and CosineAnnealingLR. Train for up to 40 epochs with patience=10 and submit eval.
